## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed (commands / mood table)
- [ ] New sprite assets are CC0 or original, and credited if not my own
- [ ] I tested this on macOS (note Apple Silicon / Intel, macOS version)
